basic_details.job_title: MPMMCC Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC)
basic_details.short_information: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) Project Nurse III Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of MPMMCC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MPMMCC Project Nurse III Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA four-year Nursing Course.
qualification.details: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA four-year Nursing Course.

selection_process: Written Test (if required) Skill Test Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MPMMCC Project Nurse -III?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Nurse -III position at MPMMCC is scheduled for 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Nurse -III post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a Second Class or equivalent CGPA in a four-year Nursing Course.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Nurse -III post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Nurse -III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 33,600 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Nurse -III role?
faq.answer: The selection process may include a Written Test (if required), a Skill Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh (Pincode: 221005).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at MPMMCC.

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available for the Project Nurse -III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Nurse -III position.
